tEn: SGDR: Stochastic Gradient Descent with Warm Restarts
tZh: SGDR：带热重启的随机梯度下降
sEn: A simple warm restart technique for SGD improves anytime performance and achieves state-of-the-art results on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100.
sZh: 一种简单的SGD热重启技术提升了任意时刻的性能，并在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上取得了最先进的结果。
absEn: Restart techniques are common in gradient-free optimization to deal with multimodal functions. Partial warm restarts are also gaining popularity in gradient-based optimization to improve the rate of convergence in accelerated gradient schemes to deal with ill-conditioned functions. In this paper, we propose a simple warm restart technique for stochastic gradient descent to improve its anytime performance when training deep neural networks. We empirically study its performance on the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets, where we demonstrate new state-of-the-art results at 3.14% and 16.21%, respectively. We also demonstrate its advantages on a dataset of EEG recordings and on a downsampled version of the ImageNet dataset. Our source code is available at https://github.com/loshchil/SGDR
absZh: 重启技术在无梯度优化中常用于处理多模态函数。部分热重启在基于梯度的优化中也越来越受欢迎，以加速梯度方案中的收敛速度，处理病态函数。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的随机梯度下降热重启技术，以提高训练深度神经网络时的任意时刻性能。我们在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上进行了实证研究，分别取得了3.14%和16.21%的最新最优结果。我们还在EEG记录数据集和ImageNet数据集的下采样版本上展示了其优势。我们的源代码可在https://github.com/loshchil/SGDR获取。

contrib.en: Proposes SGDR, a warm restart technique for SGD to improve anytime performance in training deep neural networks.
contrib.zh: 提出SGDR，一种用于SGD的热重启技术，以提升深度神经网络训练中的实时性能。

contrib.en: Achieves new state-of-the-art results on CIFAR-10 (3.14%) and CIFAR-100 (16.21%) using ensembles of snapshots.
contrib.zh: 在CIFAR-10（3.14%）和CIFAR-100（16.21%）上使用快照集成取得了新的最优结果。

contrib.en: Demonstrates 2x to 4x faster convergence compared to standard learning rate schedules on CIFAR datasets.
contrib.zh: 在CIFAR数据集上，相比标准学习率调度，收敛速度提升2到4倍。

contrib.en: Validates SGDR on EEG recordings and downsampled ImageNet, showing better anytime performance.
contrib.zh: 在脑电图记录和下采样ImageNet上验证SGDR，展示了更好的实时性能。

contrib.en: Shows that SGDR enables efficient ensemble building from intermediate model snapshots at no extra cost.
contrib.zh: 表明SGDR能够从中间模型快照中高效构建集成，无需额外成本。
提供开源代码以确保可复现性。

limits.en: Empirical study limited to CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, EEG, and downsampled ImageNet datasets.
limits.zh: 实证研究仅限于CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、脑电图和下采样ImageNet数据集。

limits.en: No theoretical analysis of convergence or generalization guarantees for SGDR.
limits.zh: 缺乏对SGDR收敛性或泛化保证的理论分析。

limits.en: Hyperparameter sensitivity of initial learning rate and restart period not fully explored.
limits.zh: 初始学习率和重启周期的超参数敏感性未充分探索。

limits.en: Results may not generalize to other architectures or optimization methods beyond SGD with momentum.
limits.zh: 结果可能无法推广到其他架构或除带动量SGD之外的优化方法。

limits.en: Ensemble performance relies on multiple runs and snapshot selection, increasing computational cost.
limits.zh: 集成性能依赖于多次运行和快照选择，增加了计算成本。

items.en: Restart techniques are common in gradient-free optimization to deal with multimodal functions. Partial warm restarts are also gaining popularity in gradient-based optimization to improve the rate of convergence in accelerated gradient schemes to deal with ill-conditioned functions. In this paper, we propose a simple warm restart technique for stochastic gradient descent to improve its anytime performance when training deep neural networks. We empirically study its performance on the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets, where we demonstrate new state-of-the-art results at 3.14% and 16.21%, respectively. We also demonstrate its advantages on a dataset of EEG recordings and on a downsampled version of the ImageNet dataset. Our source code is available at https://github.com/loshchil/SGDR
items.zh: 重启技术在无梯度优化中常用于处理多模态函数。部分热重启在基于梯度的优化中也越来越受欢迎，用于提高加速梯度方案在病态函数上的收敛速度。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的随机梯度下降热重启技术，以改善其在训练深度神经网络时的任意时间性能。我们在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上进行了实证研究，分别取得了3.14%和16.21%的最新结果。我们还在一个脑电图记录数据集和ImageNet数据集的下采样版本上展示了其优势。我们的源代码可在https://github.com/loshchil/SGDR获取。

items.en: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are currently the best-performing method for many classification problems, such as object recognition from images (Krizhevsky et al., 2012a; Donahue et al., 2014) or speech recognition from audio data (Deng et al., 2013). Their training on large datasets (where DNNs perform particularly well) is the main computational bottleneck: it often requires several days, even on high-performance GPUs, and any speedups would be of substantial value.
items.zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）目前是许多分类问题（如图像目标识别（Krizhevsky等人，2012a；Donahue等人，2014）或音频数据语音识别（Deng等人，2013））中性能最好的方法。它们在大型数据集上的训练（DNN在此表现尤为出色）是主要的计算瓶颈：即使在高性能GPU上，也常常需要数天时间，任何加速都具有重要价值。

items.en: but this is often infeasible since the computation and storage of the inverse Hessian Ht−1superscriptsubscriptH𝑡1\textit{{H}}_{t}^{-1} is intractable for large n𝑛n. The usual way to deal with this problem by using limited-memory quasi-Newton methods such as L-BFGS (Liu & Nocedal, 1989) is not currently in favor in deep learning, not the least due to (i) the stochasticity of ∇ft​(xt)∇subscript𝑓𝑡subscriptx𝑡\nabla f_{t}(\textit{{x}}_{t}), (ii) ill-conditioning of f𝑓f and (iii) the presence of saddle points as a result of the hierarchical geometric structure of the parameter space (Fukumizu & Amari, 2000). Despite some recent progress in understanding and addressing the latter problems (Bordes et al., 2009; Dauphin et al., 2014; Choromanska et al., 2014; Dauphin et al., 2015), state-of-the-art optimization techniques attempt to approximate the inverse Hessian in a reduced way, e.g., by considering only its diagonal to achieve adaptive learning rates. AdaDelta (Zeiler, 2012) and Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2014) are notable examples of such methods.
items.zh: 但这通常不可行，因为对于大的n，逆Hessian矩阵H_t^{-1}的计算和存储是难以处理的。通过使用有限内存拟牛顿方法（如L-BFGS（Liu & Nocedal, 1989））来处理这个问题的常用方法目前在深度学习中并不受欢迎，主要原因包括：(i) ∇f_t(x_t)的随机性，(ii) f的病态性，以及(iii) 参数空间层次几何结构导致的鞍点存在（Fukumizu & Amari, 2000）。尽管最近在理解和解决后两个问题方面取得了一些进展（Bordes等人，2009；Dauphin等人，2014；Choromanska等人，2014；Dauphin等人，2015），最先进的优化技术尝试以简化方式近似逆Hessian，例如仅考虑其对角线以实现自适应学习率。AdaDelta（Zeiler, 2012）和Adam（Kingma & Ba, 2014）是此类方法的显著例子。

items.en: Intriguingly enough, the current state-of-the-art results on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, SVHN, ImageNet, PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets were obtained by Residual Neural Networks (He et al., 2015; Huang et al., 2016c; He et al., 2016; Zagoruyko & Komodakis, 2016) trained without the use of advanced methods such as AdaDelta and Adam. Instead, they simply use SGD with momentum 111More specifically, they employ Nesterov’s momentum (Nesterov, 1983; 2013):
items.zh: 有趣的是，目前在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、SVHN、ImageNet、PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上的最新结果是由残差神经网络（He等人，2015；Huang等人，2016c；He等人，2016；Zagoruyko & Komodakis, 2016）获得的，这些网络在训练时没有使用AdaDelta和Adam等高级方法。相反，它们仅使用带动量的SGD：

items.en: where vtsubscriptv𝑡\textit{{v}}_{t} is a velocity vector initially set to 0, ηtsubscript𝜂𝑡\eta_{t} is a decreasing learning rate and μtsubscript𝜇𝑡\mu_{t} is a momentum rate which defines the trade-off between the current and past observations of ∇ft​(xt)∇subscript𝑓𝑡subscriptx𝑡\nabla f_{t}(\textit{{x}}_{t}). The main difficulty in training a DNN is then associated with the scheduling of the learning rate and the amount of L2 weight decay regularization employed. A common learning rate schedule is to use a constant learning rate and divide it by a fixed constant in (approximately) regular intervals. The blue line in Figure 1 shows an example of such a schedule, as used by Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016) to obtain the state-of-the-art results on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and SVHN datasets.
items.zh: 其中v_t是初始化为0的速度向量，η_t是递减的学习率，μ_t是动量率，定义了当前和过去∇f_t(x_t)观测之间的权衡。训练DNN的主要困难在于学习率的调度和L2权重衰减正则化的使用量。常见的学习率调度是使用恒定学习率，并在（近似）固定间隔内将其除以固定常数。图1中的蓝线显示了这种调度的一个例子，Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)使用它获得了CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和SVHN数据集上的最新结果。

items.en: In this paper, we propose to periodically simulate warm restarts of SGD, where in each restart the learning rate is initialized to some value and is scheduled to decrease. Four different instantiations of this new learning rate schedule are visualized in Figure 1. Our empirical results suggest that SGD with warm restarts requires 2×\times to 4×\times fewer epochs than the currently-used learning rate schedule schemes to achieve comparable or even better results. Furthermore, combining the networks obtained right before restarts in an ensemble following the approach proposed by Huang et al. (2016a) improves our results further to 3.14% for CIFAR-10 and 16.21% for CIFAR-100. We also demonstrate its advantages on a dataset of EEG recordings and on a downsampled version of the ImageNet dataset.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出定期模拟SGD的热重启，其中每次重启时学习率初始化为某个值并计划递减。图1可视化了这种新学习率调度的四种不同实例。我们的实证结果表明，与当前使用的学习率调度方案相比，带热重启的SGD需要少2到4倍的epoch即可达到相当甚至更好的结果。此外，按照Huang等人（2016a）提出的方法，将重启前获得的网络组合成集成，进一步将我们的结果提升到CIFAR-10的3.14%和CIFAR-100的16.21%。我们还在一个脑电图记录数据集和ImageNet数据集的下采样版本上展示了其优势。

items.en: When optimizing multimodal functions one may want to find all global and local optima. The tractability of this task depends on the landscape of the function at hand and the budget of function evaluations. Gradient-free optimization approaches based on niching methods (Preuss, 2015) usually can deal with this task by covering the search space with dynamically allocated niches of local optimizers. However, these methods usually work only for relatively small search spaces, e.g., n<10𝑛10n<10, and do not scale up due to the curse of dimensionality (Preuss, 2010). Instead, the current state-of-the-art gradient-free optimizers employ various restart mechanisms (Hansen, 2009; Loshchilov et al., 2012). One way to deal with multimodal functions is to iteratively sample a large number λ𝜆\lambda of candidate solutions, make a step towards better solutions and slowly shape the sampling distribution to maximize the likelihood of successful steps to appear again (Hansen & Kern, 2004). The larger the λ𝜆\lambda, the more global search is performed requiring more function evaluations. In order to achieve good anytime performance, it is common to start with a small λ𝜆\lambda and increase it (e.g., by doubling) after each restart. This approach works best on multimodal functions with a global funnel structure and also improves the results on ill-conditioned problems where numerical issues might lead to premature convergence when λ𝜆\lambda is small (Hansen, 2009).
items.zh: 在优化多模态函数时，人们可能希望找到所有全局和局部最优解。此任务的可行性取决于函数的景观和函数评估的预算。基于小生境方法（Preuss, 2015）的无梯度优化方法通常可以通过用局部优化器的动态分配小生境覆盖搜索空间来处理此任务。然而，这些方法通常仅适用于相对较小的搜索空间，例如n<10，并且由于维数灾难（Preuss, 2010）而无法扩展。相反，当前最先进的无梯度优化器采用各种重启机制（Hansen, 2009；Loshchilov等人，2012）。处理多模态函数的一种方法是迭代采样大量λ个候选解，向更好的解迈进一步，并缓慢调整采样分布以最大化成功步骤再次出现的可能性（Hansen & Kern, 2004）。λ越大，执行的全局搜索越多，需要的函数评估也越多。为了获得良好的任意时间性能，通常从小的λ开始，并在每次重启后增加（例如，加倍）。这种方法在具有全局漏斗结构的多模态函数上效果最佳，并且也改善了病态问题的结果，其中当λ较小时，数值问题可能导致过早收敛（Hansen, 2009）。

full.secZh: 2.2 基于梯度的优化中的重启

items.en: Gradient-based optimization algorithms such as BFGS can also perform restarts to deal with multimodal functions (Ros, 2009). In large-scale settings when the usual number of variables n𝑛n is on the order of 103−109superscript103superscript10910^{3}-10^{9}, the availability of gradient information provides a speedup of a factor of n𝑛n w.r.t. gradient-free approaches. Warm restarts are usually employed to improve the convergence rate rather than to deal with multimodality: often it is sufficient to approach any local optimum to a given precision and in many cases the problem at hand is unimodal. Fletcher & Reeves (1964) proposed to flesh the history of conjugate gradient method every n𝑛n or (n+1)𝑛1(n+1) iterations. Powell (1977) proposed to check whether enough orthogonality between ∇f​(xt−1)∇𝑓subscriptx𝑡1\nabla f(\textit{{x}}_{t-1}) and ∇f​(xt)∇𝑓subscriptx𝑡\nabla f(\textit{{x}}_{t}) has been lost to warrant another warm restart. Recently, O’Donoghue & Candes (2012) noted that the iterates of accelerated gradient schemes proposed by Nesterov (1983; 2013) exhibit a periodic behavior if momentum is overused. The period of the oscillations is proportional to the square root of the local condition number of the (smooth convex) objective function. The authors showed that fixed warm restarts of the algorithm with a period proportional to the conditional number achieves the optimal linear convergence rate of the original accelerated gradient scheme. Since the condition number is an unknown parameter and its value may vary during the search, they proposed two adaptive warm restart techniques (O’Donoghue & Candes, 2012):
items.zh: 基于梯度的优化算法（如BFGS）也可以执行重启以处理多模态函数（Ros, 2009）。在大规模设置中，当变量数n通常在10^3到10^9量级时，梯度信息的可用性相对于无梯度方法提供了n倍的加速。热重启通常用于提高收敛速度，而不是处理多模态性：通常足以以给定精度接近任何局部最优解，并且在许多情况下，问题本身是单峰的。Fletcher & Reeves (1964) 提出每n或(n+1)次迭代重置共轭梯度法的历史。Powell (1977) 提出检查∇f(x_{t-1})和∇f(x_t)之间是否失去了足够的正交性以保证另一次热重启。最近，O'Donoghue & Candes (2012) 注意到，如果动量使用过度，Nesterov (1983; 2013) 提出的加速梯度方案的迭代会表现出周期性行为。振荡的周期与（光滑凸）目标函数的局部条件数的平方根成正比。作者表明，以与条件数成比例的周期进行算法的固定热重启可以达到原始加速梯度方案的最优线性收敛速度。由于条件数是未知参数，且其值在搜索过程中可能变化，他们提出了两种自适应热重启技术（O'Donoghue & Candes, 2012）：

items.en: The function scheme restarts whenever the objective function increases.
items.zh: 函数方案在目标函数增加时重启。

items.en: The gradient scheme restarts whenever the angle between the momentum term and the negative gradient is obtuse, i.e, when the momentum seems to be taking us in a bad direction, as measured by the negative gradient at that point. This scheme resembles the one of Powell (1977) for the conjugate gradient method.
items.zh: 梯度方案在动量项与负梯度之间的角度为钝角时重启，即当动量似乎将我们引向不良方向时，由该点的负梯度衡量。该方案类似于Powell (1977) 针对共轭梯度法提出的方案。

items.en: O’Donoghue & Candes (2012) showed (and it was confirmed in a set of follow-up works) that these simple schemes provide an acceleration on smooth functions and can be adjusted to accelerate state-of-the-art methods such as FISTA on nonsmooth functions.
items.zh: O'Donoghue & Candes (2012) 表明（并在后续一系列工作中得到证实），这些简单方案在光滑函数上提供了加速，并且可以调整以加速非光滑函数上的最先进方法（如FISTA）。

items.en: Smith (2015; 2016) recently introduced cyclical learning rates for deep learning, his approach is closely-related to our approach in its spirit and formulation but does not focus on restarts.
items.zh: Smith (2015; 2016) 最近引入了深度学习的循环学习率，他的方法在精神和表述上与我们的方法密切相关，但并未关注重启。

items.en: Yang & Lin (2015) showed that Stochastic subGradient Descent with restarts can achieve a linear convergence rate for a class of non-smooth and non-strongly convex optimization problems where the epigraph of the objective function is a polyhedron. In contrast to our work, they never increase the learning rate to perform restarts but decrease it geometrically at each epoch. To perform restarts, they periodically reset the current solution to the averaged solution from the previous epoch.
items.zh: Yang & Lin (2015) 表明，带重启的随机次梯度下降对于一类非光滑且非强凸的优化问题（目标函数的epigraph是多面体）可以实现线性收敛速度。与我们的工作相反，他们从不增加学习率来执行重启，而是在每个epoch几何级数地降低学习率。为了执行重启，他们周期性地将当前解重置为前一个epoch的平均解。

full.sec: 3 Stochastic Gradient Descent with warm restarts (SGDR)
full.secZh: 3 带热重启的随机梯度下降（SGDR）

items.en: The existing restart techniques can also be used for stochastic gradient descent if the stochasticity is taken into account. Since gradients and loss values can vary widely from one batch of the data to another, one should denoise the incoming information: by considering averaged gradients and losses, e.g., once per epoch, the above-mentioned restart techniques can be used again.
items.zh: 现有的重启技术也可以用于随机梯度下降，前提是考虑了随机性。由于梯度和损失值可能因数据批次不同而有很大差异，应对传入信息进行去噪：通过考虑平均梯度和损失（例如，每个epoch一次），可以再次使用上述重启技术。

items.en: In this work, we consider one of the simplest warm restart approaches. We simulate a new warm-started run / restart of SGD once Tisubscript𝑇𝑖T_{i} epochs are performed, where i𝑖i is the index of the run. Importantly, the restarts are not performed from scratch but emulated by increasing the learning rate ηtsubscript𝜂𝑡\eta_{t} while the old value of xtsubscriptx𝑡\textit{{x}}_{t} is used as an initial solution. The amount of this increase controls to which extent the previously acquired information (e.g., momentum) is used.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑最简单的热重启方法之一。我们在执行T_i个epoch后模拟一次新的热启动运行/重启SGD，其中i是运行的索引。重要的是，重启不是从头开始，而是通过增加学习率η_t来模拟，同时使用x_t的旧值作为初始解。这种增加的程度控制了先前获取的信息（例如动量）的使用程度。

items.en: Within the i𝑖i-th run, we decay the learning rate with a cosine annealing for each batch as follows:
items.zh: 在第i次运行中，我们使用余弦退火对每个批次的学习率进行衰减，如下所示：

items.en: where ηm​i​nisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑛\eta^{i}_{min} and ηm​a​xisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑥\eta^{i}_{max} are ranges for the learning rate, and Tc​u​rsubscript𝑇𝑐𝑢𝑟T_{cur} accounts for how many epochs have been performed since the last restart. Since Tc​u​rsubscript𝑇𝑐𝑢𝑟T_{cur} is updated at each batch iteration t𝑡t, it can take discredited values such as 0.1, 0.2, etc. Thus, ηt=ηm​a​xisubscript𝜂𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑥\eta_{t}=\eta^{i}_{max} when t=0𝑡0t=0 and Tc​u​r=0subscript𝑇𝑐𝑢𝑟0T_{cur}=0. Once Tc​u​r=Tisubscript𝑇𝑐𝑢𝑟subscript𝑇𝑖T_{cur}=T_{i}, the cos\cos{} function will output −11-1 and thus ηt=ηm​i​nisubscript𝜂𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑛\eta_{t}=\eta^{i}_{min}. The decrease of the learning rate is shown in Figure 1 for fixed Ti=50subscript𝑇𝑖50T_{i}=50, Ti=100subscript𝑇𝑖100T_{i}=100 and Ti=200subscript𝑇𝑖200T_{i}=200; note that the logarithmic axis obfuscates the typical shape of the cosine function.
items.zh: 其中η_min^i和η_max^i是学习率的范围，T_cur表示自上次重启以来已执行的epoch数。由于T_cur在每个批次迭代t时更新，它可以取离散值，如0.1、0.2等。因此，当t=0且T_cur=0时，η_t = η_max^i。一旦T_cur = T_i，cos函数将输出-1，因此η_t = η_min^i。学习率的下降如图1所示，对于固定的T_i=50、T_i=100和T_i=200；注意对数坐标轴掩盖了余弦函数的典型形状。

items.en: In order to improve anytime performance, we suggest an option to start with an initially small Tisubscript𝑇𝑖T_{i} and increase it by a factor of Tm​u​l​tsubscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡T_{mult} at every restart (see, e.g., Figure 1 for T0=1,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇01subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=1,T_{mult}=2 and T0=10,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇010subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=10,T_{mult}=2). It might be of great interest to decrease ηm​a​xisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑥\eta^{i}_{max} and ηm​i​nisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑛\eta^{i}_{min} at every new restart. However, for the sake of simplicity, here, we keep ηm​a​xisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑥\eta^{i}_{max} and ηm​i​nisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑛\eta^{i}_{min} the same for every i𝑖i to reduce the number of hyperparameters involved.
items.zh: 为了提高任意时刻性能，我们建议从一个初始较小的T_i开始，并在每次重启时将其乘以因子T_mult（例如，图1中T_0=1, T_mult=2和T_0=10, T_mult=2的情况）。在每次新重启时减小η_max^i和η_min^i可能非常有意义。然而，为简单起见，这里我们保持η_max^i和η_min^i对于每个i相同，以减少涉及的超参数数量。

items.en: Since our simulated warm restarts (the increase of the learning rate) often temporarily worsen performance, we do not always use the last xtsubscriptx𝑡\textit{{x}}_{t} as our recommendation for the best solution (also called the incumbent solution). While our recommendation during the first run (before the first restart) is indeed the last xtsubscriptx𝑡\textit{{x}}_{t}, our recommendation after this is a solution obtained at the end of the last performed run at ηt=ηm​i​nisubscript𝜂𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑛\eta_{t}=\eta^{i}_{min}. We emphasize that with the help of this strategy, our method does not require a separate validation data set to determine a recommendation.
items.zh: 由于我们模拟的热重启（学习率的增加）通常会暂时降低性能，我们并不总是使用最后一个x_t作为最佳解（也称为当前最优解）的推荐。虽然第一次运行（第一次重启前）的推荐确实是最后一个x_t，但此后的推荐是在η_t=η_min^i的最后一次运行结束时获得的解。我们强调，借助这一策略，我们的方法不需要单独的验证数据集来确定推荐。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Test errors on CIFAR-10 (left column) and CIFAR-100 (right column) datasets. Note that for SGDR we only plot the recommended solutions. The top and middle rows show the same results on WRN-28-10, with the middle row zooming into the good performance region of low test error. The bottom row shows performance with a wider network, WRN-28-20. The results of the default learning rate schedules of Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016) with η0=0.1subscript𝜂00.1\eta_{0}=0.1 and η0=0.05subscript𝜂00.05\eta_{0}=0.05 are depicted by the blue and red lines, respectively. The schedules of ηtsubscript𝜂𝑡\eta_{t} used in SGDR are shown with i) restarts every T0=50subscript𝑇050T_{0}=50 epochs (green line); ii) restarts every T0=100subscript𝑇0100T_{0}=100 epochs (black line); iii) restarts every T0=200subscript𝑇0200T_{0}=200 epochs (gray line); iv) restarts with doubling (Tm​u​l​t=2subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{mult}=2) periods of restarts starting from the first epoch (T0=1subscript𝑇01T_{0}=1, dark green line); and v) restarts with doubling (Tm​u​l​t=2subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{mult}=2) periods of restarts starting from the tenth epoch (T0=10subscript𝑇010T_{0}=10, magenta line).
items.capZh: 图2：CIFAR-10（左列）和CIFAR-100（右列）数据集上的测试误差。注意，对于SGDR，我们只绘制了推荐的解。顶部和中间行显示WRN-28-10的相同结果，中间行放大了低测试误差的良好性能区域。底部行显示更宽网络WRN-28-20的性能。Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)的默认学习率调度（η_0=0.1和η_0=0.05）的结果分别用蓝线和红线表示。SGDR中使用的η_t调度显示为：i) 每T_0=50个epoch重启（绿线）；ii) 每T_0=100个epoch重启（黑线）；iii) 每T_0=200个epoch重启（灰线）；iv) 从第一个epoch开始（T_0=1）重启周期加倍（T_mult=2）（深绿线）；v) 从第十个epoch开始（T_0=10）重启周期加倍（T_mult=2）（品红线）。

items.en: We consider the problem of training Wide Residual Neural Networks (WRNs; see Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016) for details) on the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets (Krizhevsky, 2009). We will use the abbreviation WRN-d𝑑d-k𝑘k to denote a WRN with depth d𝑑d and width k𝑘k. Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016) obtained the best results with a WRN-28-10 architecture, i.e., a Residual Neural Network with d=28𝑑28d=28 layers and k=10𝑘10k=10 times more filters per layer than used in the original Residual Neural Networks (He et al., 2015; 2016).
items.zh: 我们考虑在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集（Krizhevsky, 2009）上训练宽残差神经网络（WRN；详见Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)）的问题。我们将使用缩写WRN-d-k表示深度为d、宽度为k的WRN。Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)使用WRN-28-10架构获得了最佳结果，即深度d=28层、每层滤波器数量是原始残差神经网络（He et al., 2015; 2016）的k=10倍的残差神经网络。

items.en: The CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets (Krizhevsky, 2009) consist of 32×\times32 color images drawn from 10 and 100 classes, respectively, split into 50,000 train and 10,000 test images. For image preprocessing Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016) performed global contrast normalization and ZCA whitening. For data augmentation they performed horizontal flips and random crops from the image padded by 4 pixels on each side, filling missing pixels with reflections of the original image.
items.zh: CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集（Krizhevsky, 2009）分别由来自10类和100类的32×32彩色图像组成，分为50,000张训练图像和10,000张测试图像。对于图像预处理，Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)进行了全局对比度归一化和ZCA白化。对于数据增强，他们进行了水平翻转和从每边填充4个像素的图像中随机裁剪，缺失像素用原始图像的反射填充。

items.en: For training, Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016) used SGD with Nesterov’s momentum with initial learning rate set to η0=0.1subscript𝜂00.1\eta_{0}=0.1, weight decay to 0.0005, dampening to 0, momentum to 0.9 and minibatch size to 128. The learning rate is dropped by a factor of 0.2 at 60, 120 and 160 epochs, with a total budget of 200 epochs. We reproduce the results of Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016) with the same settings except that i) we subtract per-pixel mean only and do not use ZCA whitening; ii) we use SGD with momentum as described by eq. (3-4) and not Nesterov’s momentum.
items.zh: 对于训练，Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)使用带动量的SGD（Nesterov动量），初始学习率设为η_0=0.1，权重衰减为0.0005，阻尼为0，动量为0.9，小批量大小为128。学习率在第60、120和160个epoch时下降0.2倍，总预算为200个epoch。我们使用相同的设置重现了Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)的结果，但有以下不同：i) 我们仅减去每个像素的均值，不使用ZCA白化；ii) 我们使用公式(3-4)描述的带动量SGD，而不是Nesterov动量。

items.en: The schedule of ηtsubscript𝜂𝑡\eta_{t} used by Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016) is depicted by the blue line in Figure 1. The same schedule but with η0=0.05subscript𝜂00.05\eta_{0}=0.05 is depicted by the red line. The schedule of ηtsubscript𝜂𝑡\eta_{t} used in SGDR is also shown in Figure 1, with two initial learning rates T0subscript𝑇0T_{0} and two restart doubling periods.
items.zh: Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)使用的η_t调度如图1中的蓝线所示。相同调度但η_0=0.05的情况用红线表示。SGDR中使用的η_t调度也显示在图1中，具有两个初始学习率T_0和两个重启翻倍周期。

items.en: SGDR with T0=50subscript𝑇050T_{0}=50, T0=100subscript𝑇0100T_{0}=100 and T0=200subscript𝑇0200T_{0}=200 for Tm​u​l​t=1subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡1T_{mult}=1 perform warm restarts every 50, 100 and 200 epochs, respectively. A single run of SGD with the schedule given by eq. (5) for T0=200subscript𝑇0200T_{0}=200 shows the best results suggesting that the original schedule of WRNs might be suboptimal w.r.t. the test error in these settings. However, the same setting with T0=200subscript𝑇0200T_{0}=200 leads to the worst anytime performance except for the very last epochs.
items.zh: 对于T_mult=1，T_0=50、T_0=100和T_0=200的SGDR分别每50、100和200个epoch执行一次热重启。使用公式(5)给出的调度且T_0=200的单次SGD运行显示出最佳结果，表明WRN的原始调度在这些设置下可能相对于测试误差是次优的。然而，相同的T_0=200设置导致最差的任意时刻性能，除了最后几个epoch。

items.en: SGDR with T0=1,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇01subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=1,T_{mult}=2 and T0=10,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇010subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=10,T_{mult}=2 performs its first restart after 1 and 10 epochs, respectively. Then, it doubles the maximum number of epochs for every new restart. The main purpose of this doubling is to reach good test error as soon as possible, i.e., achieve good anytime performance. Figure 2 shows that this is achieved and test errors around 4% on CIFAR-10 and around 20% on CIFAR-100 can be obtained about 2-4 times faster than with the default schedule used by Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016).
items.zh: T_0=1, T_mult=2和T_0=10, T_mult=2的SGDR分别在1个和10个epoch后执行第一次重启。然后，每次新重启时，最大epoch数翻倍。这样做的目的是尽快达到良好的测试误差，即实现良好的任意时刻性能。图2显示，这已经实现，在CIFAR-10上约4%的测试误差和在CIFAR-100上约20%的测试误差可以比Zagoruyko & Komodakis (2016)使用的默认调度快约2-4倍获得。

items.en: Since SGDR achieves good performance faster, it may allow us to train larger networks. We therefore investigated whether results on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 can be further improved by making WRNs two times wider, i.e., by training WRN-28-20 instead of WRN-28-10. Table 1 shows that the results indeed improved, by about 0.25% on CIFAR-10 and by about 0.5-1.0% on CIFAR-100. While network architecture WRN-28-20 requires roughly three-four times more computation than WRN-28-10, the aggressive learning rate reduction of SGDR nevertheless allowed us to achieve a better error rate in the same time on WRN-28-20 as we spent on 200 epochs of training on WRN-28-10. Specifically, Figure 2 (right middle and right bottom) show that after only 50 epochs, SGDR (even without restarts, using T0=50,Tm​u​l​t=1formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇050subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡1T_{0}=50,T_{mult}=1) achieved an error rate below 19% (whereas none of the other learning methods performed better than 19.5% on WRN-28-10). We therefore have hope that – by enabling researchers to test new architectures faster – SGDR’s good anytime performance may also lead to improvements of the state of the art.
items.zh: 由于SGDR能更快地获得良好性能，它可能允许我们训练更大的网络。因此，我们研究了是否可以通过将WRN加宽两倍（即训练WRN-28-20而不是WRN-28-10）来进一步改进CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上的结果。表1显示结果确实有所改进，在CIFAR-10上约0.25%，在CIFAR-100上约0.5-1.0%。虽然网络架构WRN-28-20需要的计算量大约是WRN-28-10的三到四倍，但SGDR的激进学习率降低仍然使我们在WRN-28-20上以与WRN-28-10上200个epoch训练相同的时间获得了更低的错误率。具体来说，图2（右中和右下）显示，仅50个epoch后，SGDR（即使没有重启，使用T_0=50, T_mult=1）就实现了低于19%的错误率（而其他学习方法在WRN-28-10上的表现均未优于19.5%）。因此，我们希望——通过使研究人员能够更快地测试新架构——SGDR的良好任意时刻性能也可能导致最先进水平的改进。

items.en: In a final experiment for SGDR by itself, Figure 7 in the appendix compares SGDR and the default schedule with respect to training and test performance. As the figure shows, SGDR optimizes training loss faster than the standard default schedule until about epoch 120. After this, the default schedule overfits, as can be seen by an increase of the test error both on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 (see, e.g., the right middle plot of Figure 7). In contrast, we only witnessed very mild overfitting for SGDR.
items.zh: 在SGDR本身的最后一个实验中，附录中的图7比较了SGDR和默认调度在训练和测试性能方面的表现。如图所示，SGDR在约第120个epoch之前比标准默认调度更快地优化了训练损失。此后，默认调度过拟合，如CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上测试误差的增加所示（例如，见图7的右中图）。相比之下，我们观察到SGDR只有非常轻微的过拟合。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Test errors of ensemble models built from N𝑁N runs of SGDR on WRN-28-10 with M𝑀M model snapshots per run made at epochs 150, 70 and 30 (right before warm restarts of SGDR as suggested by Huang et al. (2016a)). When M𝑀M=1 (respectively, M𝑀M=2), we aggregate probabilities of softmax layers of snapshot models at epoch index 150 (respectively, at epoch indexes 150 and 70).
items.capZh: 图3：由WRN-28-10上N次SGDR运行构建的集成模型的测试误差，每次运行有M个模型快照，分别在第150、70和30个epoch（如Huang等人(2016a)建议的SGDR热重启之前）制作。当M=1（分别为M=2）时，我们聚合第150个epoch（分别为第150和70个epoch）的快照模型的softmax层概率。

items.en: Our initial arXiv report on SGDR (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016) inspired a follow-up study by Huang et al. (2016a) in which the authors suggest to take M𝑀M snapshots of the models obtained by SGDR (in their paper referred to as cyclical learning rate schedule and cosine annealing cycles) right before M𝑀M last restarts and to use those to build an ensemble, thereby obtaining ensembles “for free” (in contrast to having to perform multiple independent runs). The authors demonstrated new state-of-the-art results on CIFAR datasets by making ensembles of DenseNet models (Huang et al., 2016b). Here, we investigate whether their conclusions hold for WRNs used in our study. We used WRN-28-10 trained by SGDR with T0=10,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇010subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=10,T_{mult}=2 as our baseline model.
items.zh: 我们关于SGDR的初始arXiv报告（Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016）启发了Huang等人(2016a)的后续研究，其中作者建议在SGDR（在他们的论文中称为循环学习率调度和余弦退火周期）的最后M次重启之前获取M个模型快照，并使用这些快照构建集成，从而“免费”获得集成（与执行多次独立运行相反）。作者通过构建DenseNet模型（Huang等人, 2016b）的集成，在CIFAR数据集上展示了新的最先进结果。在这里，我们研究他们的结论是否适用于我们研究中使用的WRN。我们使用由SGDR（T_0=10, T_mult=2）训练的WRN-28-10作为基线模型。

items.en: Three runs (N=3𝑁3N=3) of SGDR with M=3𝑀3M=3 snapshots per run are sufficient to greatly improve the results to 3.25% on CIFAR-10 and 16.64% on CIFAR-100 outperforming the results of Huang et al. (2016a). By increasing N𝑁N to 16 one can achieve 3.14% on CIFAR-10 and 16.21% on CIFAR-100. We believe that these results could be further improved by considering better baseline models than WRN-28-10 (e.g., WRN-28-20).
items.zh: 三次运行（N=3）的SGDR，每次运行有M=3个快照，足以将结果大幅改进到CIFAR-10上3.25%和CIFAR-100上16.64%，优于Huang等人(2016a)的结果。通过将N增加到16，可以在CIFAR-10上达到3.14%，在CIFAR-100上达到16.21%。我们相信，通过考虑比WRN-28-10更好的基线模型（例如WRN-28-20），这些结果可以进一步改进。

items.capEn: Figure 4: (Top) Improvements obtained by the baseline learning rate schedule and SGDR w.r.t. the best known reference classification error on a dataset of electroencephalographic (EEG) recordings of brain activity for classification of actual right and left hand and foot movements of 14 subjects with roughly 1000 trials per subject. Both considered approaches were tested with the initial learning rate l​r=0.025𝑙𝑟0.025lr=0.025 (Top-Left) and l​r=0.05𝑙𝑟0.05lr=0.05 (Top-Right). Note that the baseline approach is considered with different settings of the total number of epochs: 30, 60, ……\ldots, 480. (Bottom) SGDR with l​r=0.025𝑙𝑟0.025lr=0.025 and l​r=0.05𝑙𝑟0.05lr=0.05 without and with M𝑀M model snapshots taken at the last M=n​r/2𝑀𝑛𝑟2M=nr/2 restarts, where n​r𝑛𝑟nr is the total number of restarts.
items.capZh: 图4：（顶部）基线学习率调度和SGDR相对于已知最佳参考分类误差的改进，数据集为脑电图（EEG）记录的大脑活动，用于分类14名受试者的实际左右手和脚部运动，每名受试者约1000次试验。两种方法均以初始学习率lr=0.025（左上）和lr=0.05（右上）进行测试。注意，基线方法考虑了不同的总epoch数设置：30、60、……、480。（底部）SGDR，lr=0.025和lr=0.05，无和有M个模型快照，快照取自最后M=nr/2次重启，其中nr是重启总数。

full.sec: 4.4 Experiments on a dataset of EEG recordings
full.secZh: 4.4 脑电图记录数据集上的实验

items.en: To demonstrate the generality of SGDR, we also considered a very different domain: a dataset of electroencephalographic (EEG) recordings of brain activity for classification of actual right and left hand and foot movements of 14 subjects with roughly 1000 trials per subject (Schirrmeister et al., 2017). The best classification results obtained with the original pipeline based on convolutional neural networks designed by Schirrmeister et al. (2017) were used as our reference. First, we compared the baseline learning rate schedule with different settings of the total number of epochs and initial learning rates (see Figure 4). When 30 epochs were considered, we dropped the learning rate by a factor of 10 at epoch indexes 10, 15 and 20. As expected, with more epochs used and a similar (budget proportional) schedule better results can be achieved. Alternatively, one can consider SGDR and get a similar final performance while having a better anytime performance without defining the total budget of epochs beforehand.
items.zh: 为了展示SGDR的通用性，我们还考虑了一个非常不同的领域：一个脑电图（EEG）记录的大脑活动数据集，用于分类14名受试者的实际左右手和脚部运动，每名受试者约1000次试验（Schirrmeister等人, 2017）。使用Schirrmeister等人(2017)设计的基于卷积神经网络的原始流水线获得的最佳分类结果作为我们的参考。首先，我们比较了基线学习率调度与不同的总epoch数和初始学习率设置（见图4）。当考虑30个epoch时，我们在第10、15和20个epoch将学习率降低10倍。正如预期，使用更多epoch和类似的（预算成比例）调度可以获得更好的结果。或者，可以考虑SGDR，在获得类似最终性能的同时，具有更好的任意时刻性能，且无需事先定义总epoch预算。

items.en: Similarly to our results on the CIFAR datasets, our experiments with the EEG data confirm that snapshots are useful and the median reference error (about 9%) can be improved i) by 1-2%percent\% when model snapshots of a single run are considered, and ii) by 2-3%percent\% when model snapshots from both hyperparameter settings are considered. The latter would correspond to N=2𝑁2N=2 in Section (4.3).
items.zh: 与我们在CIFAR数据集上的结果类似，我们在EEG数据上的实验证实快照是有用的，中位参考误差（约9%）可以通过以下方式改进：i) 当考虑单次运行的模型快照时，改进1-2%；ii) 当考虑来自两个超参数设置的模型快照时，改进2-3%。后者对应于第(4.3)节中的N=2。

full.sec: 4.5 Preliminary experiments on a downsampled ImageNet dataset
full.secZh: 4.5 下采样ImageNet数据集上的初步实验

items.capEn: Figure 5: Top-1 and Top-5 test errors obtained by SGD with momentum with the default learning rate schedule, SGDR with T0=1,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇01subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=1,T_{mult}=2 and SGDR with T0=10,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇010subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=10,T_{mult}=2 on WRN-28-10 trained on a version of ImageNet, with all images from all 1000 classes downsampled to 32 ×\times 32 pixels. The same baseline data augmentation as for the CIFAR datasets is used. Four settings of the initial learning rate are considered: 0.050, 0.025, 0.01 and 0.005.
items.capZh: 图5：使用默认学习率调度的带动量SGD、T_0=1, T_mult=2的SGDR和T_0=10, T_mult=2的SGDR在WRN-28-10上训练ImageNet版本（所有1000类的所有图像下采样至32×32像素）的Top-1和Top-5测试误差。使用与CIFAR数据集相同的基线数据增强。考虑了四种初始学习率设置：0.050、0.025、0.01和0.005。

items.en: In order to additionally validate our SGDR on a larger dataset, we constructed a downsampled version of the ImageNet dataset [P. Chrabaszcz, I. Loshchilov and F. Hutter. A Downsampled Variant of ImageNet as an Alternative to the CIFAR datasets., in preparation]. In contrast to earlier attempts (Pouransari & Ghili, 2015), our downsampled ImageNet contains exactly the same images from 1000 classes as the original ImageNet but resized with box downsampling to 32 ×\times 32 pixels. Thus, this dataset is substantially harder than the original ImageNet dataset because the average number of pixels per image is now two orders of magnitude smaller. The new dataset is also more difficult than the CIFAR datasets because more classes are used and the relevant objects to be classified often cover only a tiny subspace of the image and not most of the image as in the CIFAR datasets.
items.zh: 为了在更大数据集上进一步验证我们的SGDR，我们构建了ImageNet数据集的下采样版本[P. Chrabaszcz, I. Loshchilov and F. Hutter. A Downsampled Variant of ImageNet as an Alternative to the CIFAR datasets., in preparation]。与早期尝试（Pouransari & Ghili, 2015）不同，我们的下采样ImageNet包含与原始ImageNet完全相同的来自1000类的图像，但通过框下采样调整大小为32×32像素。因此，该数据集比原始ImageNet数据集困难得多，因为每张图像的平均像素数现在小了两个数量级。新数据集也比CIFAR数据集更困难，因为使用了更多类别，并且要分类的相关对象通常只覆盖图像的一小部分子空间，而不是像CIFAR数据集那样覆盖图像的大部分。

items.en: We benchmarked SGD with momentum with the default learning rate schedule, SGDR with T0=1,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇01subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=1,T_{mult}=2 and SGDR with T0=10,Tm​u​l​t=2formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇010subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2T_{0}=10,T_{mult}=2 on WRN-28-10, all trained with 4 settings of the initial learning rate ηm​a​xisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑥\eta^{i}_{max}: 0.050, 0.025, 0.01 and 0.005. We used the same data augmentation procedure as for the CIFAR datasets. Similarly to the results on the CIFAR datasets, Figure 5 shows that SGDR demonstrates better anytime performance. SGDR with T0=10,Tm​u​l​t=2,ηm​a​xi=0.01formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇010formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡2subscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑥0.01T_{0}=10,T_{mult}=2,\eta^{i}_{max}=0.01 achieves top-1 error of 39.24% and top-5 error of 17.17% matching the original results by AlexNets (40.7% and 18.2%, respectively) obtained on the original ImageNet with full-size images of ca. 50 times more pixels per image (Krizhevsky et al., 2012b). Interestingly, when the dataset is permuted only within 10 subgroups each formed from 100 classes, SGDR also demonstrates better results (see Figure 8 in the Supplementary Material). An interpretation of this might be that while the initial learning rate seems to be very important, SGDR reduces the problem of improper selection of the latter by scanning / annealing from the initial learning rate to 0.
items.zh: 我们在WRN-28-10上对默认学习率调度的带动量SGD、T_0=1, T_mult=2的SGDR和T_0=10, T_mult=2的SGDR进行了基准测试，所有方法均使用四种初始学习率η_max^i设置：0.050、0.025、0.01和0.005。我们使用了与CIFAR数据集相同的数据增强过程。与CIFAR数据集上的结果类似，图5显示SGDR表现出更好的任意时刻性能。T_0=10, T_mult=2, η_max^i=0.01的SGDR实现了39.24%的Top-1误差和17.17%的Top-5误差，与AlexNets在原始ImageNet上使用全尺寸图像（每张图像像素数约多50倍）获得的原始结果（分别为40.7%和18.2%）相当（Krizhevsky等人, 2012b）。有趣的是，当数据集仅在由100个类别组成的10个子组内进行排列时，SGDR也表现出更好的结果（见补充材料中的图8）。对此的一种解释可能是，虽然初始学习率似乎非常重要，但SGDR通过从初始学习率扫描/退火到0，减少了后者选择不当的问题。

items.en: Clearly, longer runs (more than 40 epochs considered in this preliminary experiment) and hyperparameter tuning of learning rates, regularization and other hyperparameters shall further improve the results.
items.zh: 显然，更长的训练轮次（本初步实验中考虑了超过40个epoch）以及学习率、正则化和其他超参数的超参数调优将进一步改善结果。

items.en: Our results suggest that even without any restarts the proposed aggressive learning rate schedule given by eq. (5) is competitive w.r.t. the default schedule when training WRNs on the CIFAR-10 (e.g., for T0=200,Tm​u​l​t=1formulae-sequencesubscript𝑇0200subscript𝑇𝑚𝑢𝑙𝑡1T_{0}=200,T_{mult}=1) and CIFAR-100 datasets. In practice, the proposed schedule requires only two hyper-parameters to be defined: the initial learning rate and the total number of epochs.
items.zh: 我们的结果表明，即使没有重启，由公式(5)给出的激进学习率调度在CIFAR-10（例如，T0=200, T_mult=1）和CIFAR-100数据集上训练WRN时，与默认调度相比具有竞争力。实际上，所提出的调度只需要定义两个超参数：初始学习率和总epoch数。

items.en: We found that the anytime performance of SGDR remain similar when shorter epochs are considered (see section 8.1 in the Supplemenary Material).
items.zh: 我们发现，当考虑较短的epoch时，SGDR的任意时刻性能保持相似（见补充材料第8.1节）。

items.en: One should not suppose that the parameter values used in this study and many other works with (Residual) Neural Networks are selected to demonstrate the fastest decrease of the training error. Instead, the best validation or / and test errors are in focus. Notably, the validation error is rarely used when training Residual Neural Networks because the recommendation is defined by the final solution (in our approach, the final solution of each run). One could use the validation error to determine the optimal initial learning rate and then run on the whole dataset; this could further improve results.
items.zh: 不应假设本研究及许多其他使用（残差）神经网络的工作中选取的参数值是为了展示训练误差的最快下降。相反，关注的是最佳验证误差或/和测试误差。值得注意的是，在训练残差神经网络时很少使用验证误差，因为推荐由最终解（在我们的方法中，每次运行的最终解）决定。可以使用验证误差来确定最优初始学习率，然后在完整数据集上运行；这可以进一步改善结果。

items.en: The main purpose of our proposed warm restart scheme for SGD is to improve its anytime performance. While we mentioned that restarts can be useful to deal with multi-modal functions, we do not claim that we observe any effect related to multi-modality.
items.zh: 我们提出的SGD热重启方案的主要目的是改善其任意时刻性能。虽然我们提到重启可用于处理多模态函数，但我们并未声称观察到任何与多模态相关的效果。

items.en: As we noted earlier, one could decrease ηm​a​xisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑥\eta^{i}_{max} and ηm​i​nisubscriptsuperscript𝜂𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑛\eta^{i}_{min} at every new warm restart to control the amount of divergence. If new restarts are worse than the old ones w.r.t. validation error, then one might also consider going back to the last best solution and perform a new restart with adjusted hyperparameters.
items.zh: 如前所述，可以在每次新的热重启时降低η_max^i和η_min^i以控制发散程度。如果新重启在验证误差方面比旧重启更差，则可以考虑回到上一个最佳解，并使用调整后的超参数执行新的重启。

items.en: Our results reproduce the finding by Huang et al. (2016a) that intermediate models generated by SGDR can be used to build efficient ensembles at no cost. This finding makes SGDR especially attractive for scenarios when ensemble building is considered.
items.zh: 我们的结果再现了Huang等人（2016a）的发现，即SGDR生成的中间模型可以用于零成本构建高效集成。这一发现使得SGDR在考虑集成构建的场景中特别有吸引力。

items.en: In this paper, we investigated a simple warm restart mechanism for SGD to accelerate the training of DNNs. Our SGDR simulates warm restarts by scheduling the learning rate to achieve competitive results on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 roughly two to four times faster. We also achieved new state-of-the-art results with SGDR, mainly by using even wider WRNs and ensembles of snapshots from SGDR’s trajectory. Future empirical studies should also consider the SVHN, ImageNet and MS COCO datasets, for which Residual Neural Networks showed the best results so far. Our preliminary results on a dataset of EEG recordings suggest that SGDR delivers better and better results as we carry out more restarts and use more model snapshots. The results on our downsampled ImageNet dataset suggest that SGDR might also reduce the problem of learning rate selection because the annealing and restarts of SGDR scan / consider a range of learning rate values. Future work should consider warm restarts for other popular training algorithms such as AdaDelta (Zeiler, 2012) and Adam (Kingma & Ba, 2014).
items.zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一种简单的SGD热重启机制，以加速DNN的训练。我们的SGDR通过调度学习率模拟热重启，在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上大约快两到四倍地达到竞争性结果。我们还通过使用更宽的WRN和SGDR轨迹的快照集成，取得了新的最先进结果。未来的实证研究还应考虑SVHN、ImageNet和MS COCO数据集，残差神经网络在这些数据集上迄今表现最佳。我们在EEG记录数据集上的初步结果表明，随着执行更多重启和使用更多模型快照，SGDR会提供越来越好的结果。我们在下采样ImageNet数据集上的结果表明，SGDR可能还减少了学习率选择的问题，因为其退火和重启扫描/考虑了一系列学习率值。未来的工作应考虑将热重启应用于其他流行的训练算法，如AdaDelta（Zeiler, 2012）和Adam（Kingma & Ba, 2014）。

items.en: Alternative network structures should be also considered; e.g., soon after our initial arXiv report (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016), Zhang et al. (2016); Huang et al. (2016b); Han et al. (2016) reported that WRNs models can be replaced by more memory-efficient models. Thus, it should be tested whether our results for individual models and ensembles can be further improved by using their networks instead of WRNs. Deep compression methods (Han et al., 2015) can be used to reduce the time and memory costs of DNNs and their ensembles.
items.zh: 还应考虑替代网络结构；例如，在我们最初的arXiv报告（Loshchilov & Hutter, 2016）之后不久，Zhang等人（2016）、Huang等人（2016b）和Han等人（2016）报告称，WRN模型可以被更节省内存的模型取代。因此，应测试使用他们的网络而非WRN是否能进一步改善我们单个模型和集成的结果。深度压缩方法（Han等人，2015）可用于降低DNN及其集成的时间和内存成本。
